name: Myutant Cry
name_jp: ミュートリアスの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>産</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>うぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>声</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごえ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During the Main Phase: Fusion Summon 1 "Myutant" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling the Fusion Materials listed on it into the Deck, from among your cards on the field, in your GY, and/or your face-up banished cards. You can only activate 1 "Myutant Cry" per turn.
eff: During the Main Phase: Fusion Summon 1 "Myutant" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling the Fusion Materials listed on it into the Deck, from among your cards on the field, in your GY, and/or your face-up banished cards. You can only activate 1 "Myutant Cry" per turn.

action: Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
Uses the player's banished cards as Fusion Materials
Returns Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon to Deck
Returns from your field to your Deck
Returns from your field to your Extra Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Extra Deck
Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck by effect
Returns the player's banished cards to the Extra Deck
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
